title: accounting-v1
description: Accounting service contract v1 — 55 operations across contacts, invoices, bills, payments, reports, and payroll.

operations.name: organisation
operations.description: Get organisation details and settings

operations.name: connections
operations.description: List connected tenants/organisations

operations.name: contacts
operations.description: List contacts with name, status, and date filters

operations.name: contact
operations.description: Get contact detail including addresses and phone numbers

operations.name: invoices
operations.description: List sales invoices with status, date, and contact filters

operations.name: invoice
operations.description: Get invoice detail with line items and payment allocations

operations.name: bills
operations.description: List purchase invoices/bills with status and date filters

operations.name: bill
operations.description: Get bill detail with line items

operations.name: payments
operations.description: List payments with date range and status filters

operations.name: accounts
operations.description: List chart of accounts with type and class filters

operations.name: profit_loss
operations.description: Get profit and loss report for a date range

operations.name: balance_sheet
operations.description: Get balance sheet report as at a given date

operations.name: account
operations.description: Get account detail with balance and tax type

operations.name: payment
operations.description: Get payment detail with allocation information

operations.name: bank_transactions
operations.description: List bank transactions with date and account filters

operations.name: bank_transaction
operations.description: Get bank transaction detail with line items

operations.name: credit_notes
operations.description: List credit notes with status and contact filters

operations.name: credit_note
operations.description: Get credit note detail with allocations

operations.name: purchase_orders
operations.description: List purchase orders with status and date filters

operations.name: purchase_order
operations.description: Get purchase order detail with line items

operations.name: quotes
operations.description: List quotes with status, date, and contact filters

operations.name: quote
operations.description: Get quote detail with line items and terms

operations.name: trial_balance
operations.description: Get trial balance report as at a given date

operations.name: aged_receivables
operations.description: Get aged receivables report with period breakdown

operations.name: aged_payables
operations.description: Get aged payables report with period breakdown

operations.name: tax_rates
operations.description: List tax rates and their components

operations.name: currencies
operations.description: List active currencies

operations.name: tracking_categories
operations.description: List tracking categories and their options

operations.name: manual_journals
operations.description: List manual journal entries

operations.name: manual_journal
operations.description: Get manual journal detail with lines

operations.name: invoice_pdf
operations.description: Get invoice as PDF binary

operations.name: branding_themes
operations.description: List branding themes for document customisation

operations.name: employees
operations.description: List payroll employees

operations.name: employee
operations.description: Get payroll employee detail with tax, super, leave

operations.name: timesheets
operations.description: List payroll timesheets with date and status filters

operations.name: timesheet
operations.description: Get timesheet detail with lines and hours

operations.name: payslips
operations.description: List payslips for a pay run

operations.name: payslip
operations.description: Get payslip detail with earnings, deductions, super, tax

operations.name: verify_webhook
operations.description: HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification

operations.name: create_contact
operations.description: Create a new contact (customer or supplier)

operations.name: update_contact
operations.description: Update contact details

operations.name: archive_contact
operations.description: Archive a contact (requires confirmation)

operations.name: create_invoice
operations.description: Create a sales invoice with line items

operations.name: update_invoice
operations.description: Update a draft or submitted invoice

operations.name: void_invoice
operations.description: Void an invoice (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: email_invoice
operations.description: Email an invoice to its contact

operations.name: create_bill
operations.description: Create a purchase invoice/bill

operations.name: update_bill
operations.description: Update a draft or submitted bill

operations.name: create_payment
operations.description: Record a payment against an invoice or bill

operations.name: delete_payment
operations.description: Delete a payment (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: create_credit_note
operations.description: Create a credit note

operations.name: void_credit_note
operations.description: Void a credit note (destructive, requires confirmation)

operations.name: create_bank_transaction
operations.description: Create a bank transaction (spend or receive money)

operations.name: create_quote
operations.description: Create a quote

operations.name: create_purchase_order
operations.description: Create a purchase order
